# NextGen Digital Studio

> AI Sales Automation Agency in Bangladesh. We help businesses automate marketing, sales, customer communication and operations with Artificial Intelligence — so you generate qualified leads and book calls 24/7, on autopilot.

NextGen Digital Studio is an AI Sales Automation Agency based in Jessore, Bangladesh, founded by Md. Nazmul Islam Taj (Taj Bhai). We serve businesses across Bangladesh with AI-powered solutions.

## Services

- AI Lead Capture: 24/7 instant response chatbots on website, Facebook, WhatsApp (Bangla + English)
- AI Follow-Up: Automated multi-touch sequences that revive dead leads
- AI Sales Agent: AI that books appointments and qualifies leads like your best salesperson
- CRM + Analytics: Track every lead, every taka. Real-time ROI dashboard
- WhatsApp Automation: Official WhatsApp Business API chatbot & broadcasts
- Lead Generation: Predictable, qualified leads on autopilot
- Performance Marketing: Meta, Google & TikTok ads
- Sales Funnel Development: High-converting funnels
- Business Automation: n8n, Zapier, Make — automate operations
- Website Development: Lightning-fast, SEO-ready websites
- Landing Page Design: High-converting landing pages
- AI Consultation: Clear AI roadmap to cut costs, scale revenue

## Products

- 3D Portrait Service: CNC 3D face sculpting from photos
- CNC Design Bundle: 150GB of ready-to-cut CNC design files (150TK)
- PDF Books: 5 premium books on mind training, money psychology, branding, sales
- AI Training: 1-week intensive AI course (1000TK, 9 PM daily)
- CNC 3D Design Training: 1-week CNC design course (250TK, 9 PM daily)
